hooks.command: bash -c 'D="$PWD"; C=$(test -f "$D/CLAUDE.md" && echo y || echo n); F=$(find "$D" -maxdepth 2 \( -name "*.py" -o -name "*.ts" \) ! -path "*node_modules*" ! -path "*.venv*" ! -path "*.git*" 2>/dev/null | head -1); P=$(grep -l "{{" "$D/CLAUDE.md" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$C" = "n" ] && [ -z "$F" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE1_GREENFIELD"; elif [ "$C" = "n" ] && [ -n "$F" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE7_BROWNFIELD"; elif [ -n "$P" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE1_GREENFIELD (placeholder)"; elif [ "$C" = "y" ] && [ -z "$F" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE2_SPEC_ONLY"; elif [ "$C" = "y" ] && [ -n "$F" ]; then echo "[FORGE] EXISTING_PROJECT"; fi; if [ -f "$D/SPEC.md" ]; then RC=$(grep -oP "REQ-\d+" "$D/SPEC.md" 2>/dev/null | sort -u | wc -l); echo "[FORGE-SYNC] $RC REQs tracked."; fi'
bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm -rf|git push --force|git reset --hard|git clean -f"; then echo "[FORGE] BLOCKED: Destructive command" && exit 2; fi'
bash -c 'F="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; if echo "$F" | grep -q "\.py$"; then python -m ruff check --fix "$F" 2>/dev/null; fi; true'
